title: Mediterranean-Style Fish Pilaf
description: A Japanese-inspired pilaf dish infused with Mediterranean flavors, featuring fish as the main protein.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the pilaf mix and cook, stirring frequently, until lightly toasted (3-4 minutes).
Add the salmon fillets and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until cooked through.
Transfer the cooked salmon to a plate and cover with foil to keep warm.
In the same skillet, add the lemon juice, soy sauce, and ginger. Stir to combine.
Return the salmon to the skillet and spoon some of the pilaf mix over the top.
Garnish with green onions and serve immediately.
Serve with additional lemon wedges and soy sauce, if desired.
